champion.name: Figure 03
champion.reason: First humanoid engineered for high-volume manufacturing. Deployed at BMW facility with 400% efficiency boost on key assembly tasks. Appeared alongside Melania Trump at the White House AI Education Summit. Priced at $20,000 — a breakthrough for commercial humanoids.
champion.latestUpdate: White House debut with Melania Trump at AI Summit — Mar 2026

champion.name: Atlas (Electric)
champion.reason: Production version launched at CES 2026. 30+ years of R&D distilled into an all-electric platform with superhuman range of motion, 56 DoF, and IP67 durability. All 2026 deployments fully committed — shipping to Hyundai RMAC and Google DeepMind.
champion.latestUpdate: 2026 production fully committed; 30K/yr factory planned for 2028 — Mar 2026

champion.name: Galbot G1
champion.reason: Powered by embodied AI models (GraspVLA, GroceryVLA) with 95–97% grasp success rate. 1,000+ units shipped to BAIC, CATL, and others. Now deployed as China's first pharmacy robot in Beijing Haidian. Priced at ¥630K–700K (~$87K–$97K).
champion.latestUpdate: China's first pharmacy robot deployed in Beijing Haidian — Mar 2026

champion.name: 小布米 (XiaobuMi)
champion.reason: Starting at ¥9,998 (~$1,370), breaking the price floor for consumer humanoid robots. Appeared on 2026 CCTV Spring Festival Gala. Core components 90%+ domestically sourced, driving costs down dramatically.
champion.latestUpdate: Spring Gala appearance; on sale at JD.com ¥9,998–¥21,600 — Feb 2026

champion.name: Spot
champion.reason: The gold standard for enterprise quadrupeds. Now deployed at scale in AI data centers ($175K–$300K/unit), construction sites, and energy infrastructure. Partnered with FieldAI to build one of the world's largest third-party quadruped fleets.
champion.latestUpdate: Guarding major AI data centers; FieldAI partnership for construction — Mar 2026

champion.name: π₀ (Pi-Zero)
champion.reason: A generalist robot foundation model controlling multiple robot types across diverse tasks — from a single neural network. Released π0.5 with better open-world generalization, and MEM for complex tasks over 10 minutes. Now raising $1B at $11B valuation.
champion.latestUpdate: Raising $1B at $11B valuation; MEM and π0.5 released — Mar 2026

champion.name: N2 小顽童
champion.reason: Runner-up at the world's first humanoid robot half-marathon. First humanoid to perform continuous backflips. Official humanoid robot partner for 2026 CCTV Spring Festival Gala. 92 units delivered, company completed 6 rounds of financing.
champion.latestUpdate: Official CCTV Spring Gala robot partner; 6 funding rounds ~¥100M — Feb 2026

champion.name: MagicBot Z1
champion.reason: AI-powered emotion sensing via voice and facial expression. 6 units danced with pop stars at 2026 Spring Gala before 1.2 billion viewers — sold out on JD.com within minutes. Deployed in electronics factories for inspection, assembly, and transport.
champion.latestUpdate: Sold out on JD.com after Spring Gala; factory deployment ongoing — Feb 2026
